creator: jonny@jonny.eng.br
text:
Hi,

    As the maintainer, I've analysed the options, and prefer Barry's way of
fixing (removing Config).  I've also contacted the author to propose fixes for
a next version.

    BTW: Barry, next time, contact the maintainer first.  I only knew about
the problem because Peter came to me.

    Thanks in advance,

                                        Jonny

--
